我方可看穿一層森林、敵伏兵更難成立（林地線）: You see one tile deep into forest, making enemy ambushes much harder to set
進駐容量 +25%、駐軍加箭權重↑、塔射程 +20: Garrison capacity +25%, garrisoned units add more arrows, tower range +20
城牆/城門強化、抵消部分攻城加成（守城線）: Stronger walls and gates that cancel part of the siege bonus
英格蘭獨有：射程遠、齊射壓制: England only: long range and suppressing volleys
神聖羅馬獨有：高防高 HP、頂住衝鋒: Holy Roman Empire only: heavy armour and HP, holds a charge
蒙古獨有：移動射擊靠閃避: Mongol only: shoots on the move and lives by evasion
漁船採集量 +40%＋解鎖漁籠（漁船就地下籠·可再生海食）（水上經濟線）: Fishing boats gather +40% and can drop fish traps for renewable sea food
投石船對船傷害 +50%（強化投石船剋火船·RPS headroom）: Siege ships do +50% damage to ships
英格蘭獨有：戰船射程再 +18%（遠海壓制）: England only: war galley range +18% on top
神聖羅馬獨有：全船 近/遠防 +2（耐揍）: Holy Roman Empire only: +2 melee and ranged defence on every ship
蒙古獨有：火船移速 +18%（機動突擊）: Mongol only: fire ships move 18% faster
弓兵射程/齊射、自耕農均衡經濟、城堡尚可: Archer range and volleys, a steady yeoman economy, decent castles
正面近戰肉搏弱、機動偏慢: Weak in a straight melee, slow to reposition
長弓兵（克雷西/阿金庫爾）；偵察視野協同射程: Longbowmen (Crécy, Agincourt); scouting sight that feeds their reach
攻防數值多一階且更便宜、城防工事、封建農業均衡: A cheaper extra step of attack and defence, strong fortifications, solid feudal farming
機動慢、偵察弱、怕放風箏: Slow, poor scouting, and easily kited
重步兵＋工事；淬火攻城、城防抵消攻城加成: Heavy infantry behind fortifications; tempered siege, battlements that blunt siege bonuses
全軍移速＋、部分免維持、機動經濟、偵察強: Faster army, part of it free of upkeep, mobile economy, excellent scouting
攻城/守城弱、建築脆: Poor at taking and holding fortifications, fragile buildings
弓騎兵＋蹄鐵衝鋒、軍需免維持（劫掠機動）: Horse archers and shod chargers, living off the land as they raid
越域吸附回歸: snapped back into its own movement domain
目標在別的通行區域: the target sits in another walkable region
·改走最近可達點: · heading to the nearest reachable point instead
無可登艦的陸軍或已滿載: No land units in range, or the transport is full
s 且落後→回規則腦: s and behind -> falling back to the rule-based brain
